rows.last_follow_up_note:
Hi Johan, following up on my previous message. I noticed the local Philippine billet market has been quite volatile this week due to Middle East tensions, leading to some panic buying among local distributors.
We are currently holding our price for DH36/EH36 plates for our upcoming Cebu shipment to help our partners avoid this price surge. Since you⁲e overseeing hull projects, would it be helpful to lock in some volume now for your Q2/Q3 requirements before the freight or material costs rise further?

rows.name: Industrial Welding Corporation
rows.last_won_raw: Ç鄭趆业她戡欠SWRY11 L狷厄盘癡朢
rows.last_follow_up_note:
Dear Purchasing Team,
Greetings from C&D Steel.
We⁶e noticed the recent surge in procurement activity across the Philippines, driven by concerns over Middle East tensions and rising freight. Many local manufacturers are currently "panic buying" to hedge against the 490-500 USD/MT billet price volatility.
In this challenging environment, C&D Steel is supporting Philippine electrode manufacturers by offering:
Direct Mill Pricing: Bypassing middleman costs for SWRY11.
Flexible Payment: Tailored terms for established partners like Nihonweld.
Quality Assurance: Full traceability and certifications matching international welding standards.
We understand you have established suppliers, but in a volatile market, having a Fortune 500 secondary source is essential for risk management.
Are you open to a brief price comparison for your May/June requirements? I am confident our current landed cost to the Philippines will be highly competitive.
Best regards,

rows.last_follow_up_note:
Dear Purchasing Team / Management at Steelworld,
I am James from C&D Steel (a Fortune Global 500 company). We have been closely monitoring the supply chain requirements for major Philippine manufacturers and are well aware of Steelworld⁳ significant and regular demand for 6.5mm and 8.0mm wire rods.
Based on current market intelligence, we understand your monthly requirement for these specifications exceeds 2,500 tons. As you prepare for your next procurement cycle for May/June shipments, I would like to offer C&D Steel as a strategic secondary (or primary) supply partner to optimize your costs.
Why consider C&D Steel for your next 2,000+ ton batch?
Market Timing: Since early March, the billet and wire rod market has seen upward pressure (now hitting 490-500 USD/MT CFR levels). We are currently holding a special allocation for the Philippines that can hedge against these rising costs.
Logistics Advantage: We managed several major shipments to Manila/Subic recently. Our bulk volume allows us to secure lower ocean freight rates than standard traders, which we pass directly to you.
Fortune 500 Security: For high-volume orders (like your 2,600-ton batches), financial and delivery security is paramount. C&D offers the stability of a state-owned global enterprise.
We would appreciate the opportunity to provide a benchmark quotation for your next inquiry of 6.5mm/8.0mm rods. Even if you have an existing supplier, a quote from C&D will ensure you are getting the most competitive market price.
Could you please share your preferred technical standards (e.g., SAE1008/1010) so we can prepare a formal offer?
Best regards,

rows.last_follow_up_note:
Dear Purchasing Manager of Hadeed Trading,

I am writing from C&D Steel (Cheongfuli Xiamen), the dedicated steel supply chain arm of Xiamen C&D Inc. (Fortune Global 500, Ranked 98th).

We have been closely following the expansion of Hadeed Trading's galvanizing plant and its contribution to the Ethiopian steel industry. As a leading global supplier, we specialize in providing high-standard Cold Rolled Steel Coils (HS 72091500), particularly for industrial manufacturing and galvanizing applications.

Knowing your recent demand for CRC with thickness e∳mm (800MT+ batches), we believe our LIFT supply chain service can offer you:

Top-Tier Reliability: Guaranteed quality from China's leading mills with full traceability.

Competitive Pricing: Leveraging our annual 12 million-ton sales volume to provide prices more optimized than the current market rate.

Flexible Logistics: Professional handling of shipments to Djibouti with advanced risk management.

Could you please let us know your specific requirements for the next quarter?

Best regards,











James

Cheongfuli (Xiamen) Co., Ltd.

Electronic Commerce Department

Mail: cfloffice@chinacnd.com

Web: www.cflsteel.com

Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/company/%E6%98%8C%E5%AF%8C%E5%88%A9-%E5%8E%A6%E9%97%A8-%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8/?viewAsMember=true

Tel: +86 0592 259 2583
